productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Solarsoft Thong Brown Flip Flop
description: Usher in the summer with these  cool flip flops from nike. The soft ridged footbed lends itself to maximum comfort and the lightly ridged soles offer light grip. Perfect for a day out at the beach or poolside. Tteam them with casuals and pamper your feet with a pleasure called comfort.Upper Thong straps in soft thermoplastic rubber  for extended durability Rubber toe separator with small ridges to avoid blistering between the toes Thong strap with rubber panel embedded brand mark for style Replaceable thong straps inserted into the outsole through the midsole Midsole SolarSoft foam at midsole with grooves for airflow and drainage Ridged footbed for maximum acupressure comfort Squeezable footbed offering ultimate lightweight feel Outsole Made of 1mm thick water-proof and tear resistant premium silicone skin Firm SolarSoft foam at outsole for durability and traction shoe careWipe surface using a damp clean cloth to remove dust
